majorTraces.name: Red Oni
majorTraces.description: When Acheron's Slashed Dream reaches maximum, her CRIT Rate increases by 15% for 2 turns.

majorTraces.name: Blue Oni
majorTraces.description: When an ally inflicts a debuff on an enemy, Acheron's DMG increases by 30% for 2 turns.

majorTraces.name: The Storm
majorTraces.description: At the start of battle, Acheron gains 1 point of Slashed Dream. When Acheron uses Ultimate, her CRIT DMG increases by 50% for 1 turn.
